description: Offline recall regression cases for mistakes future agents should not repeat.

cases.name: forward auth blocks CLI tools
cases.query: vault login nil response pre-flight request public host

fts.title: Use port-forward for Vault CLI preflight
fts.snippet: Trigger: vault login returns nil response or pre-flight request failures on the public host. Correct rule: use kubectl port-forward and set VAULT_ADDR to the local listener because forward-auth blocks browser-oriented hosts for CLI tools.

fts.title: Vault bootstrap policy shape
fts.snippet: Vault bootstrap writes Kubernetes auth roles and policies during platform bring-up.

vector.title: Use port-forward for Vault CLI preflight
vector.snippet: Vault CLI requests should bypass forward-auth by using port-forward and VAULT_ADDR on localhost.

cases.name: keel match tag required
cases.query: keel force policy image stuck first sha

fts.title: Keel policies require match-tag for first SHA rollout
fts.snippet: Trigger: Keel force or policy leaves an image stuck on the first SHA. Correct rule: include keel.sh/match-tag so Keel matches the mutable tag policy before replacing digest-pinned images.

fts.title: Container image pull secret rotation
fts.snippet: Rotate registry pull secrets before expiring GitHub package tokens.

vector.title: Keel policies require match-tag for first SHA rollout
vector.snippet: When a first SHA appears stuck, check the Keel policy and keel.sh/match-tag annotation before forcing a rollout.
